nasb.text: Behold, the days are coming when I will break your strength and the strength of your father’s house so that there will not be an old man in your house.

esv.text: Behold, the days are coming when I will cut off your strength and the strength of your father’s house, so that there will not be an old man in your house.

cnv.text: 日子快到了，我要砍下你和你父親的膀臂，使你家中再沒有有權勢的長者。

ccb.text: 看啊，时候将到，我要终结你和你家族的力量，你们家族必没有一个老人。
